rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT ANDREW ZACKS, ZACKS & FREEDMAN, P.C.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Hearing required.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants The Karsant Family Limited Partneship And Peter Karsant'S Regular Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2017 line 1. Defendants The Karsant Family Limited Partneship And Peter Karsant'S Regular Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint PARTIALLY GRANTED and PARTIALLY DENIED. Paragraph 57 shall be stricken only to the extent that it incorporates by reference paragraphs 18-29. Paragraphs 28 and 29 shall be stricken. Paragraphs 50, 51, and 52 shall be stricken to the extent that they contain allegations the Defendant's demand for rent was wrongful. Plaintiff's motion as to paragraphs 45-56 and paragraph 2 of the prayer is moot because of the demurrer.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT J. OVEREND VS. TIMOTHY CARAHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismissal And For Attorneys Fees, Or In The Alternative A Stay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN CONOMOS' Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismissal And For Attorneys Fees, Or In The Alternative A Stay GRANTED. Arbitration is mandatory pursuant to Paragraph 12.7 of the CC&Rs. Plaintiff does not oppose the arbitration. Defendant's request for dismissal is granted as to Plaintiff's second cause of action. Defendant's request for attorney fees is granted subject to a memorandum for costs regarding the amount.= (501/REQ) late tentative

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT J. OVEREND VS. TIMOTHY CARAHER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CARAHER and JENNIFER NORMAN's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED pursuant to Paragraphs 12.6 and 12.7 of the CC&Rs. Plaintiff did not file an opposition. The matter is stayed pending the outcome of the mediation and arbitration. Defendants' request for attorney fees is GRANTED in the amount of $2507.50 plus applicable costs.= (501/REQ) late tentative
